summary: Songpa splits internally: 갑 (박정훈 52.24, PPP) and 을 (배현진 57.20, PPP) went conservative; 병 (남인순 51.04, DPK) stayed progressive. Jamsil/Olympic Park apartment density drives conservative lean in greater Songpa, but 송파 병 (newer developments) remained competitive.

issues.label: Apartment / real-estate politics
issues.description: Jamsil/Olympic apartment belt aligns with conservative real-estate politics, consistent across cycles.

issues.label: Upper-middle-income base
issues.description: Income concentration creates ideological gradient similar to but weaker than Gangnam/Seocho.

issues.label: Redevelopment politics
issues.description: Jamsil/Olympic area redevelopment shapes preferences on zoning and property taxation.
